what: Insert new entry into knowledge database
why: New entry must be searchable immediately via the DB index

output.console: Index update result with entry count and duration

success_handling.criteria: INSERT OR REPLACE into knowledge_entries succeeds

error_handling.action: Log as warning, entry file exists but may not be searchable until next full index rebuild

event.message: Index update failed after creating entry {entry_id}

decisions.reason: Direct DB INSERT instead of full index rebuild
decisions.rationale: Running the full knowledge-index-build flow after every create is too slow. A targeted INSERT OR REPLACE is sufficient and fast.
